testcase.name: test_patch_role_invalidates_providers_cache

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'redis-cli'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration4.py:70: in test_patch_role_invalidates_providers_cache assert _redis("EXISTS", "identity:providers:active") == "1" ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_iteration4.py:29: in _redis return subprocess.run(["redis-cli", *args], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/subprocess.py:548: in run with Popen(*popenargs, **kwargs) as process: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /usr/local/lib/python3.11/subprocess.py:1026: in __init__ self._execute_child(args, executable, preexec_fn, close_fds, /usr/local/lib/python3.11/subprocess.py:1955: in _execute_child raise child_exception_type(errno_num, err_msg, err_filename) E FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'redis-cli'

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: 'redis-cli'

testcase.name: test_traffic_increases_counters

failure.message: AssertionError: cache hits did not increase (0.0->0.0) assert 0.0 > 0.0

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iteration4.py:303: in test_traffic_increases_counters assert h1 > h0, f"cache hits did not increase ({h0}->{h1})" E AssertionError: cache hits did not increase (0.0->0.0) E assert 0.0 > 0.0

testcase.name: test_redis_up_gauge_flips_when_stopped

failure.message: AssertionError: assert (<re.Match object; span=(2302, 2319), match='ccms_redis_up 0.0'> and 0.0 == 1.0) + where 0.0 = float('0.0') + where '0.0' = <built-in method group of re.Match object at 0xfdcd827ad000>(1) + where <built-in method group of re.Match object at 0xfdcd827ad000> = <re.Match object; span=(2302, 2319), match='ccms_redis_up 0.0'>.group

testcase.name: test_login_returns_new_fields_all_roles

Please slow down."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

failure.message: redis.exceptions.ConnectionError: Error 111 connecting to 127.0.0.1:6379. Connection refused.

testcase.failure:
/root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:1003: in connect_check_health sock = self._connect() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:1515: in _connect raise err /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:1499: in _connect sock.connect(socket_address) E ConnectionRefusedError: [Errno 111] Connection refused
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_perf_cache_rate.py:73: in test_redis_ping assert rds.ping() is True ^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/commands/core.py:1250: in ping return self.execute_command("PING", **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/client.py:716: in execute_command return self._execute_command(*args, **options) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/client.py:722: in _execute_command conn = self.connection or pool.get_connection() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/utils.py:236: in wrapper return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:3041: in get_connection connection.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:976: in connect self.retry.call_with_retry( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/retry.py:132: in call_with_retry raise error /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/retry.py:120: in call_with_retry return do() ^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:977: in <lambda> lambda: self.connect_check_health( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:1025: in connect_check_health raise e E redis.exceptions.ConnectionError: Error 111 connecting to 127.0.0.1:6379. Connection refused.

During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred: backend/tests/test_perf_cache_rate.py:199: in test_list_cache_and_raw_on_update_and_cancel for k in rds.scan_iter(match="appts:*"): /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/commands/core.py:3378: in scan_iter cursor, data = self.scan( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/commands/core.py:3353: in scan return self.execute_command("SCAN", *pieces, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/client.py:716: in execute_command return self._execute_command(*args, **options) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/client.py:722: in _execute_command conn = self.connection or pool.get_connection() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/utils.py:236: in wrapper return func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:3041: in get_connection connection.connect() /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:976: in connect self.retry.call_with_retry( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/retry.py:132: in call_with_retry raise error /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/retry.py:120: in call_with_retry return do() ^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:977: in <lambda> lambda: self.connect_check_health( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/redis/connection.py:1025: in connect_check_health raise e E redis.exceptions.ConnectionError: Error 111 connecting to 127.0.0.1:6379. Connection refused.

testcase.name: test_app_healthy_when_redis_stopped

failure.message: AssertionError: redis did NOT come back alive after start assert False

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_perf_cache_rate.py:374: in test_app_healthy_when_redis_stopped assert alive, "redis did NOT come back alive after start" E AssertionError: redis did NOT come back alive after start E assert False
